prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.1 kg; Height 154.2 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 210mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.7kg; 9 months ago 61.1kg; 6 months ago 59.9kg; 3 months ago 58.1kg; current 61.1kg), Height (12 months ago 154.2cm; 9 months ago 154.2cm; 6 months ago 154.2cm; 3 months ago 154.2cm; current 154.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 121mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 65U/L; 6 months ago 64U/L; 3 months ago 57U/L; current 60U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.4mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 600mg/g; 9 months ago 426mg/g; 6 months ago 575mg/g; 3 months ago 450mg/g; current 516mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
